name: Beef Wellington
recipeInstructions:
1. STUFFING: In a food processor, puree the mushrooms and onions. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat, add the mushroom and onion mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until dry. Add salt and pepper to taste and mash in the pâté. Transfer stuffing to a bowl and chill in the refrigerator.
2. MEAT: Heat oil in a skillet over high heat. Sear beef on all sides. Remove from skillet, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and refrigerate until cold.
3. ASSEMBLE THE WELLINGTON: Roll out chilled puff pastry into a rectangle large enough to enclose the beef. Spread dough with stuffing, place beef on top, and spoon additional stuffing over beef. Wrap pastry to enclose beef and stuffing, chilling for at least 15 minutes.
4. COOK THE WELLINGTON: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Lower heat immediately to 350°F (175°C). Roast Wellington for about 20 minutes.
